_publications._publicationTitle: Identification of therapeutic sensitivities in a spheroid drug combination screen of Neurofibromatosis Type I associated High Grade Gliomas.

_contextSnippet: Our human NF1-HGG line...has full loss/inactivation of NF1, ATRX, TP53 and CDKN2A...homozygous ATRX STOP mutation (E2281*)...homozygous NF1 4bp deletion causing p.LF1247fs*18
details: Has full loss/inactivation of NF1, ATRX, TP53 and CDKN2A with homozygous ATRX STOP mutation (E2281*) and homozygous NF1 4bp deletion causing p.LF1247fs*18
